message:
fix(messaging): enforce max_deliver in Stable kernel mode, normalize unique-key validation

consumer.rs (HIGH): decide_redelivery_action() returned RetryNow
immediately for non-AuditBacked (Stable) kernel mode, bypassing the
max_deliver and pending-pressure checks entirely. Infinite redelivery
was possible regardless of configured max_deliver limit. Fix: compute
the action from max_deliver/pending_ratio first, then gate only the
audit-trail logging behind AuditBacked mode.

ir.rs (MEDIUM): validate_unique_keys() checked value.trim().is_empty()
for emptiness but inserted the original untrimmed value into the seen
set. Names differing only in whitespace (e.g. "orders " vs "orders")
passed uniqueness validation despite being semantically identical.
Fix: trim values before dedup insertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
